creator: lizlam.217@gmail.com
text:
Perforce links at the bottom of page are broken:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/p4-primer/

I suggest that 'http://www.perforce.com/perforce/loadprog.html' 
be changed to 'https://www.perforce.com/downloads/helix#clients'

And that 'http://www.perforce.com/perforce/technical.html' be changed to https://www.perforce.com/perforce/doc.current/manuals/p4guide/index.html
